creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #1)

Hi Guido, this commit works both on the current tree and the 4.14.1 tree that I'm working on (4.12 is release when I believe that the breakage has occured). As you suggest, I'll switch strategy and work on submitting a review on phabricator.
